monthly_summary_note: Maintainer closed issue #222 on 2026-06-08 as automation noise. Do not create monthly activity summary issues.

open_repo_assist_prs.description: fix: add Spanish/Portuguese/Italian version key to normalize_show_key
test: add locale, edge-case, and CJK column-detection tests
fix: add versione (Italian) to pin_column_map pinned_version list
fix: is_winget_footer_line false-positive on digit-space package names
chore: bundled cargo update incl ratatui 0.30.1, supersedes PRs #230 and #236
fix: ensure_detail_hint suppresses fallback when release_notes_url is set
fix: split on '_' in version_key for consistent underscore-version sorting
feat: sort Upgrades view by available version
fix: reload detail panel after sort to prevent stale display
perf: cache logo OnceLock, consolidate load_detail scans, pre-slice rows; feat: y=copy ID to clipboard
refactor: change 6 handler helper fn return types from Result<bool> to Result<()>
chore: trim tokio features from full to minimal required set [rt-multi-thread, macros, process, sync]

backlog_cursor.next_issue_to_process: check for new human issues next run

notes: 2026-06-12 run (27388782293): Tasks 5+4. Task 5: changed 6 private handler helper fns (handle_confirm, handle_version_input, handle_search_input, handle_local_filter_input, handle_normal_mode, handle_mouse) from Result<bool> to Result<()> - they always returned Ok(false) and callers discarded the value. All 371 tests pass. Task 4: trimmed tokio features from 'full' to [rt-multi-thread, macros, process, sync] - removes unused fs/io-util/io-std/net/signal/time/tracing. All tests pass. Task 11 remains disabled per maintainer.
